subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: Jesus was a dyer by trade. He also lived in Egypt. 'Out of Egypt have I called My Son' was spoken of Jesus. The fifth Gospel which is considered non-canonical gave other history of Jesus
subcodes.subjects: @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @Christian doctrine and practice
